resume_v1.pdf&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[34m[INFO] -> Found file: resume_v2.docx&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36m[STEP 04] VALIDATING FILES&amp#27;[0m: Analyzing file extensions against supported parsers. &amp#27;[34m[INFO] -> File 'interview_notes.txt' is supported (Format: TXT)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[34m[INFO] -> File 'recruiter_spreadsheet.csv' is supported (Format: CSV)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[34m[INFO] -> File 'resume_v1.pdf' is supported (Format: PDF)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[34m[INFO] -> File 'resume_v2.docx' is supported (Format: DOCX)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36m[STEP 05] PARSING SOURCES&amp#27;[0m: Invoking format-specific parser implementations. &amp#27;[34m[INFO] -> Parsed successfully: interview_notes.txt (Source ID: txt-1782843788715)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[34m[INFO] -> Parsed successfully: recruiter_spreadsheet.csv (Source ID: csv-1782843788721)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33m[WARNING] -> Failed to parse 'resume_v1.pdf': Error: End-of-File, expected line at offset 49&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33m[WARNING] -> Failed to parse 'resume_v2.docx': No valid entries or contents found, this is not a valid OOXML (Office Open XML) file&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36m[STEP 06] NORMALIZATION & EXTRACTION&amp#27;[0m: Standardizing raw parsed metrics into candidate profile components. 2026-06-30 23:53:09 [main] INFO c.c.t.extractor.TxtDataExtractor - Extracting candidate profile from TXT source: interview_notes.txt &amp#27;[34m[INFO] -> Normalized profile extracted from source: interview_notes.txt&amp#27;[0m 2026-06-30 23:53:09 [main] INFO c.c.t.extractor.CsvDataExtractor - Extracting candidate profile from CSV source: recruiter_spreadsheet.csv &amp#27;[34m[INFO] -> Normalized profile extracted from source: recruiter_spreadsheet.csv&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36m[STEP 07] MERGING & CONFLICT RESOLUTION&amp#27;[0m: Consolidating duplicate profile components. &amp#27;[34m[INFO] -> Merged 2 profile(s) into single CandidateRecord.&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36m[STEP 08] PROVENANCE & CONFIDENCE TRACKING&amp#27;[0m: Calculating data lineage maps and overall confidence levels. &amp#27;[34m[INFO] -> Generated data provenance mapping trace for field entries.&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[34m[INFO] -> Profile Confidence Score: 0.8&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36m[STEP 09] CANONICAL PROFILE CREATION&amp#27;[0m: Reviewing canonical consolidated CandidateProfile data. &amp#27;[34m[INFO] Candidate ID : cand-8eb1b522&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[34m[INFO] Candidate Name : John Doe&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[34m[INFO] Candidate Email: john.doe@example.com&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[34m[INFO] Skills Found : 4&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[34m[INFO] Experiences : 1&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[34m[INFO] Educations : 0&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36m[STEP 10] PROJECTION&amp#27;[0m: Applying configured field-mapping projections. fields. &amp#27;[34m[INFO] -> Structural validation result: PASS&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[34m[INFO] -> Validation errors: 0&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[34m[INFO] -> Validation warnings: 0&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36m[STEP 12] JSON GENERATION & OUTPUT&amp#27;[0m: Serializing output records to JSON. &amp#27;[32m[SUCCESS] Successfully wrote final projected candidate JSON file to: D:\PROJECT
